title: T-011 — Warehouse indexes (FEFO composite, ltree, genealogy, stock_moves)
prompt:
# T-011 — Warehouse performance indexes

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.2 (FEFO composite), §5.3, §5.6, §8.6.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create the indexes referenced inline in PRD §5.2/§5.3/§5.6 supporting FEFO query (<500ms), ltree zone roll-ups, and genealogy traversal.

## Implementation contract
Migration `0NN_warehouse_indexes.sql`:
- `idx_lp_fefo` ON license_plates (tenant_id, warehouse_id, product_id, status, expiry_date ASC NULLS LAST)
- `idx_lp_status_partial` ON license_plates (id) WHERE status IN ('available','reserved')
- `idx_lp_genealogy_parent` ON lp_genealogy (parent_lp_id, operation_date DESC)
- `idx_lp_genealogy_child` ON lp_genealogy (child_lp_id, operation_date DESC)
- `idx_lp_genealogy_wo` ON lp_genealogy (wo_id, operation_type)
- `idx_stock_moves_lp_date` ON stock_moves (lp_id, move_date DESC)
- `idx_stock_moves_wo_consume` ON stock_moves (wo_id) WHERE move_type='consume_to_wo'
- GiST on locations.path (ltree) — declared/asserted in 02-SETTINGS but verify present, otherwise add.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_warehouse_indexes.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/__tests__/warehouse-indexes.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `pg_indexes` is queried, then idx_lp_fefo and the 6 other warehouse indexes exist.
2. Given an EXPLAIN of the §9.2 FEFO query, when run on a 10k-row dataset, then the planner uses idx_lp_fefo (Index Scan, not Seq Scan).
3. Given the GiST index on locations.path is queried with `path @>` operator, when EXPLAIN is run, then it uses Index Scan.

## Test strategy
- RED: warehouse-indexes.test.ts asserts pg_indexes presence and EXPLAIN plan uses idx_lp_fefo.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test warehouse-indexes` after seeding 10k rows.

## Risk red lines
- Do not drop existing 02-SETTINGS ltree indexes — verify, do not recreate destructively.
- Do not add unrelated indexes.
- Do not make any index UNIQUE.

pipeline_inputs.description: Add the FEFO/genealogy/stock_moves/ltree indexes called out in PRD §5.2/§5.3/§5.6.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration creates seven warehouse indexes; verifies the GiST index on locations.path exists from 02-SETTINGS. EXPLAIN-plan asserts confirm planner adoption.
acceptance_criteria: Given the migration runs, when pg_indexes is queried, then idx_lp_fefo and the 6 other listed indexes exist
Given EXPLAIN of the §9.2 FEFO query on a 10k-row seed, when inspected, then it uses idx_lp_fefo via Index Scan
Given EXPLAIN of `WHERE path @> 'org.apex.wh_a'::ltree` on locations, when inspected, then it uses GiST Index Scan
test_strategy: RED: warehouse-indexes.test.ts asserts catalog presence and EXPLAIN plans on a seeded fixture
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test warehouse-indexes'
risk_red_lines: Do not recreate or drop 02-SETTINGS ltree index destructively
